title: NMB (No More Brackets)
description: A server-side mod to Minecraft that will remove vanilla's chat brackets.
body:
## ⚠️This mod is no longer maintained, may receive updates in the future.

![logo](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/82117939/235451810-e8964347-9869-42ab-a866-cfbe941fe93a.png)
# No More Brackets (NMB)
This is a chat mod for Minecraft version 1.19.2 Forge ~~& soon Fabric~~ that removes the ``"< >"`` brackets around player names in the chat. These brackets were added in vanilla with the new chat reporting system, but can be distracting for some players (especially for server owners that want to customize). With this mod, players can enjoy a cleaner chat experience without the distraction of unnecessary brackets.

![demo](https://i.imgur.com/oOBvhVj.png)

``Installation``
To install this mod, simply download the latest release for Forge from the versions tab and add it to your Minecraft mods folder.

``Compatibility``
This mod is an mod to Minecraft that was originally designed to work with FTBRanks out of the box and it might not be compatible. This mod is incompatible on the client-side, **currently works on server-side only**. Fabric version is in development, more information will be on our repo or Discord.

``Support``
If you encounter any issues with this mod, please report them on them on our [Github repository](https://github.com/TeamTMW/NoMoreBrackets) repository or in our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/ModdedWarehouse). Please provide as much information as possible to help us diagnose and fix the issue. If you have a suggestion for a modification, please create an issue on our repository and discuss it with us.

``Contributing``
If you are interested in contributing to this mod, feel free to fork this mod on our repository on the right branch and make changes. Pull requests are welcome and will be reviewed by us.
